rules.title: Dining reservations may open today
rules.description: Table-service dining reservations typically open around 60 days before your first day. Check the official app for your destination's exact window.

rules.title: Lightning Lane selections open today
rules.description: Individual Lightning Lane and multi-pass selections typically become available the morning of your visit. Check the official app for exact timing.

rules.title: Online resort check-in may be available
rules.description: If you're staying on-site, online check-in is typically available a few days before arrival — a good time to add any special requests.

rules.title: Your trip forecast is now more reliable
rules.description: Weather forecasts become meaningfully more accurate within about 10 days of a visit — a good time to check the Explore tab's forecast.

rules.title: Review park hours before you go
rules.description: Park hours and schedules can change as your trip approaches — worth a final check a couple of weeks out.
